sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69008" key="muhfo/non" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μυηφόνον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n69008.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">σκίλλα</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phan.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
